title: Digimon Terminus release manifest
description: Auto-update manifest consumed by the DigimonTerminus launcher. Lists every file the client must have (full downloads) plus binary patches applied at a byte offset inside an existing pack file.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Bump only when the manifest format itself changes, not on every release.

files.description: Full files the launcher downloads and verifies by SHA-256. A file is (re)downloaded when its local hash does not match.

patches.description: Binary patches written at a byte offset inside an already-present file (e.g. a large pack). Used to avoid re-downloading a whole multi-GB pack for a small change.

releaseUrl.description: GitHub Releases download URL for this org/repo, pinned to a version tag.

path.description: Destination path relative to the client install root. Forward slashes.
Target file the patch bytes are written into.

offset.description: Byte offset within the target file where the patch payload is written.

size.description: Length in bytes of the patch payload.

sha256_after.description: Expected SHA-256 of the target file AFTER the patch is applied.

label.description: Human-readable name for the patch, for logs/UI.
